{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Jai clan Truegold elders
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Six [[Jai clan Truegold elders]] placed a boundary formation.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
